utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format requires seven items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all of these: destination (Split, Croatia), travel_dates (September 25–29, 2024), transportation (flight route, airline, times, cost), accommodation (hotel name, duration, features, cost), activities (four activities each with a cost), additional_services (local transport and document delivery with costs), and total_budget (€1,090–€1,160). All are fully specified with details and costs where required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Split, Croatia', which is not listed in the ground-truth ratings, so no destination rating is available. The transportation uses a 'Budget carrier, economy class', which matches 'budget_airlines → Economy Class' with a rating of 10. The accommodation is 'Tranquil Inn (3★)', which corresponds exactly to 'Tranquil Inn' rated 7. The activities listed are 'Scuba Diving Excursion' (rating 10), 'Rock Climbing at Marjan Cliffs' (Rock Climbing rating 10), 'Kayaking Coastal Tour' (Kayaking rating 9), and 'City Exploration & Dining' (closest match is 'City Walking Tour' with rating 8). The additional service 'Taxi round-trip €80' corresponds to 'Airport Taxi' rated 7. 'Digital document delivery' and 'Split, Croatia' are not in the ground-truth list, so they are excluded.
